entity.summary: Non-custodial multichain trading platform providing token swaps and unified cross-chain asset management and trading functionality.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation describes DeGate as a multichain, non-custodial platform for buying, selling, sending, receiving, and trading tokens across leading chains. Exact launch date is not asserted in this initial record.

evidence.title: What is DeGate
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies DeGate as a multichain non-custodial platform for buying, selling, and trading tokens across supported blockchains.

evidence.title: DeGate official platform
evidence.notes: Official product domain linked from DeGate documentation and retained as the current public platform entry point.

evidence.title: DeGate exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary registry discovery source identifies DeGate as an exchange candidate; first-party documentation remains the classification authority.
